name: Platform Configuration & Security
question: Is Clio set up correctly and securely for the firm's needs?
description: Covers user roles, permissions, 2FA, and platform configuration completeness including practice areas, custom fields, templates, activity categories, billing themes, and text snippets.

name: Matter & Contact Management
question: Is the firm's case and client data organized for efficient operations?
description: Covers matter organization and hygiene, contact data quality, calendar utilization and deadline management, and matter stage and workflow structure.

name: Time Tracking, Billing & Payments
question: Is the firm capturing revenue accurately and getting paid efficiently?
description: Covers utilization rate, time entry timeliness, billing cycle efficiency, realization rate, collection rate, and trust account activity. This is the highest-impact domain with the most direct revenue connection.

name: Document Management & Workflow Automation
question: Is the firm leveraging automation to reduce manual work and ensure consistency?
description: Covers document management maturity and task management adoption including templates, automation, and structured workflows.

name: Client Intake & Growth
question: Is the firm systematically converting leads into clients?
description: Covers intake pipeline health via Clio Grow, the Grow-to-Manage integration, and client experience and communication quality.

name: Reporting, Analytics & Integrations
question: Is the firm using data to make decisions and connecting Clio to its broader ecosystem?
description: Covers reporting utilization, license and feature utilization, and integration with third-party tools.

name: Adoption, Training & Collaboration
question: Is the team fully trained, consistently using Clio, and collaborating effectively?
description: Covers user adoption breadth and consistency, communication logging discipline, and firm technology culture and change readiness.
